note: Source of truth for greenfield-forge's module catalog (twin of codebase-rescue's). The shared drift-linter (scripts/check_consistency.py) verifies every module here has a matching reference file and that SKILL.md pointers stay consistent. 'deterministic' modules generate/scaffold from a source; 'judgment' modules require model reasoning over the brief, the decision-catalog, and the ledger. Shared spine (ledger, funnel, brainstorm, shape-engine) lives in core/ and is not re-catalogued here.

modules.notes: THE entry move. Expands references/decision-catalog.md against the brief, prunes by project type, and materializes one open_decision pin per fork with options, downstream implications, and depends_on wired from the catalog. Records brief-stated choices as pre-committed DecisionEvents (source: brief) rather than re-asking. This is the greenfield analog of rescue's finding modules: the pin source is the decision space, not the code.

Visual-first design canvas: domain entities and layer lanes as ghost/planned nodes, decision pins attached, completeness traffic-light starting all-red. Unlike rescue's wiki this renders the to-be (the design), not the as-is; nodes flip ghost->solid as BuildItems resolve. React + graph lib, same artifact family as rescue's map.

Materializes Question objects from open_decision pins and runs the shared compression funnel (core/interview-funnel.md): policy (architectural defaults) -> exception -> proposed-default, severity threshold, information-gain order (domain/persistence first). Every committed answer emits a DecisionEvent with flip_criteria.

THE core module. Authors the cross-layer contract once (shared-types package, or OpenAPI/JSON-schema/protobuf) from the decided data model, then generates aligned DB schema / ORM / DTO / client-type scaffolds from it. Uses core/shape-engine.md in generate mode. Installs the same shape-diff as a CI drift-check so alignment can never regress. contract-reconciliation run forward. Read the full playbook.

Emits BuildItems from decided pins and topologically sorts by depends_on. Waves (contract & data model -> paved road -> core slices -> secondary -> polish) fall out of the DAG, not hardcoded. Enforces vertical slices (feature end-to-end) over horizontal layers. Only decided pins yield items; deferred/undecided are not in the backlog.

Scaffolds the baseline from decided NFR/delivery decisions: test harness, linters/formatters, CI, env/secrets config, error taxonomy, and a SessionStart hook (see the session-start-hook skill). These are BuildItems too, sequenced into Wave 1 alongside the contract.

Restartable, context-resetting loop over the Phase-3 backlog. Two-track TDD with Track A (red->green from to_be) primary; Track B only when extending. Ponytail ladder = YAGNI by construction (never build ahead of a decision). Two-stage review + wave checkpoints; reopen dependent open_decision pins if a built wave falsifies a decision. Never fully autonomous.

Read-only evidence gate. Zero contract drift across generated layers, Track-A test kills mutants, built behavior reachable, paved road runs. Sets pin.state = resolved only on evidence; on failure the item returns to Phase 4. Convergence check drives the traffic-light toward gap = 0.
